title: Non-record: random-map adapter train/eval ablations on 8xH100
author: papalino456

data.description: Train-time random-map adapters using random_diag on q, v, and lm_head

novel_contributions: Non-record ablation study of train-time and evaluation-time adapters built on random linear maps
Comparison of random-map adapters against a LoRA TTT control on 8xH100
Demonstration that document-aware test-time training improves performance in this setup
Evaluation of random_diag adapters on q, v, and lm_head
Reproducible ablation harness with logs, summary TSV, and plotting utility
